backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a product search engine with store management, city-based filtering, and product search functionality. Includes hardcoded sellers (Digikala, Bamilo, Hiper) and supports adding custom stores with reputation scores and shipping times.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining type structures (Product, Store, City) and a migration function that adds nextStoreId field to the actor state, initializing it to 4.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three main features: debugging search functionality for Persian queries, analyzing the complete search flow from frontend to backend, and enhancing the StoreManagement component with comprehensive store information collection.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing components for search, store management, product results display, and styling with Persian RTL support and blue neon theme.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Smart Price Finder application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing view switching between search and store management, handling search state (results, loading, hasSearched flag), and providing QueryClient and ThemeProvider context.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright information and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters based on current hostname.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header navigation component with view switching buttons (search/stores) featuring blue neon active states and gradient styling for the selected view.
frontend/src/components/ProductResults.t: Product results grid component displaying search results with RTL layout, handling loading/empty/no-search states, and showing product cards with price, store info, reputation stars, and proximity badges.
frontend/src/components/SearchInput.tsx: React component providing a search interface with text input and image upload (placeholder) functionality, using the useProductSearch hook to query products and display results with toast notifications.
React component for managing stores, allowing users to add custom stores with details like name, URL, city, reputation score, and shipping time, then displaying a list of added stores.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductSearch.ts: Custom React hook that wraps the actor's searchByProductTitle method, managing search loading state and error handling for text-based product searches.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, RTL support for Persian text, and custom neon glow utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, Persian font family (Vazirmatn), neon glow box shadows, and custom animations for accordions and glowing effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for a Persian-language shopping search engine that aggregates products from Iranian e-commerce sites, ranking by price, proximity to Qom/Tehran, and seller reputation. Includes existing features for manual store link addition, text/image search, search history, RTL UI support, and various component tests.
